items.title: Stop-sequence detection during streaming → sliding window
items.scenario: An LLM streams tokens; stop the response as soon as a configured stop string appears.
items.explanation: A sliding window of length `len(stop)` over the last few characters matches the pattern; O(n) total.

items.title: Top-k retrieved chunks → heap
items.scenario: Select the 10 highest-similarity chunks from a 1M-chunk index.
items.explanation: `heapq.nlargest(10, chunks, key=score)` is O(n log k); a full sort would be O(n log n).

items.title: Tool DAG ordering → topological sort
items.scenario: An agent has tools with dependencies (e.g. summarize needs retrieve, which needs embed).
items.explanation: Topological sort over the dependency DAG yields a valid execution order or detects a cycle.

items.title: Token-budget allocation under a fixed prompt size → knapsack DP
items.scenario: Pick the highest-utility subset of context chunks fitting within an 8k-token budget.
items.explanation: 0/1 knapsack DP — greedy fails on this in general.

items.title: Counting components in a co-citation graph → BFS / union-find
items.scenario: Group papers into clusters by transitive citation links.
items.explanation: BFS from each unseen node, or union-find with path compression for streaming updates.

items.title: Prefix sums for token cost
items.scenario: Quickly answer 'how many tokens are in chunks i..j?' for any (i, j).
items.explanation: Pre-compute `pre[k] = pre[k-1] + tokens[k]`; each range query is O(1).
